'''Uncle Dravos''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] criminal who managed the criminal empire of [[Maxeena Sov'lya]]. He was a distant relative of her and acted as a buffer between Sov'lya and her criminal enterprises. He spent most of his time at the [[Tal'cara]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] making payoffs and brokering deals. While generally thought of as small-time, insiders knew he was highly thought of by Sov'lya.
